text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The clean, modern lines of the architecture and the glass walls give the space an air of transparency and intellectual openness. Passing through, I notice the R+D exhibit, its colorful, dynamic design hinting at the excitement of innovation and discovery. I hear echoes of ideas about human connection with intelligent machines, and I am both intrigued and slightly disoriented by the tilted perspectives. It feels as if I am about to witness the birth of new thoughts, both within this space and within myself.
